<?php /* * This file is part of the Symfony package. * * (c) Fabien Potencier <fabien@symfony.com> * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. */ namespace Symfony\Component\HttpFoundation\Session; use Symfony\Component\HttpFoundation\Session\Flash\FlashBagInterface; /** * Interface for session with a flashbag. */ interface FlashBagAwareSessionInterface extends SessionInterface { public function getFlashBag(): FlashBagInterface; }
